name: second-brain
description: Personal Cognitive OS — local-first Obsidian-backed second brain with Tauri shell, AI daily memory, and MCP agent interface

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check lib/*.mjs && node --check lib/llm/*.mjs && node tests/sanitize.test.mjs && node tests/cockpit-activity.test.mjs && node tests/llm-config.test.mjs && node tests/agent.test.mjs && node tests/graph.test.mjs && node tests/mcp.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:cockpit: node server.mjs & sleep 2 && playwright-cli open && playwright-cli run-code --filename tests/e2e/cockpit.mjs; kill %1 2>/dev/null
